body:
### Background
This repository currently contains a repo-local `/claw` command override at `.claude/commands/claw.md`. Because repo-local Claude command files take precedence over user-scope command files, this repo-specific override changes `/claw` behavior away from the user-scope definition.

The requested change is to remove the repo-local override entirely so the user-scope `/claw` command definition applies again.

### Goals
- Remove the repo-local `/claw` command override from this repository.
- Restore user-scope `/claw` command behavior by precedence.
- Keep the functional change scoped to removal of `.claude/commands/claw.md` from `origin/main`.
- Add the missing governance artifacts required by the current PR review flow.

### Tenets
- Prefer deleting the override instead of partially editing it.
- Keep the functional diff minimal and reviewable.
- Avoid unrelated command or workflow changes.
- Provide explicit evidence for the deletion and fallback behavior.

### High-level description of changes
This PR deletes `.claude/commands/claw.md` from the repository. With that file removed, command resolution falls back to the user-scope `/claw` definition in `~/.claude/commands/claw.md` instead of the repo-local implementation.

A follow-up doc-only commit adds `docs/design/pr-designs/pr-6147.md` so the PR carries the design artifact requested by the skeptic review.

### Testing
- Verified `.claude/commands/claw.md` exists on `origin/main` before making the change.
- Verified the branch diff removes `.claude/commands/claw.md`.
- Ran `python -m pytest tests/ -x -q` successfully: `48 passed, 4 skipped`.
- Verified current PR checks are green via `gh pr checks 6147`.

### Evidence
- Design doc: `docs/design/pr-designs/pr-6147.md`
- Local evidence bundle: `/tmp/worldarchitect.ai/ao-delete-repo-local-claw-1775625260/pr-6147/20260407T234433`
- Terminal recording (public gist): https://gist.github.com/jleechan2015/08e9c3604568535425cddf776e020b37

The terminal recording shows:
- the PR branch deleting `.claude/commands/claw.md`
- `.claude/commands/claw.md` absent on the PR branch
- `.claude/commands/claw.md` still present on `origin/main`

### Low-level details (up to 20 files)
- **.claude/commands/claw.md**: Deleted the repo-local `/claw` override so command resolution falls back to the user-scope definition.
- **docs/design/pr-designs/pr-6147.md**: Added the PR design document to satisfy the skeptic/design-doc requirement and record evidence.

<!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
---

> [!NOTE]
> **Low Risk**
> Low risk: this is a single functional deletion of a Claude command definition, with one follow-up doc-only governance artifact; no application/runtime code changes were made.
>
> **Overview**
> Removes the repo-local `/claw` command override by deleting `.claude/commands/claw.md`, restoring precedence to the user-scope `/claw` definition. Also adds the missing PR design doc and explicit evidence links required by current review gates.
>
> <sup>Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit f73f51f21c. Bugbot is set up for automated code reviews on this repo. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).</sup>
<!-- /CURSOR_SUMMARY -->


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

  * Removed the repository-scoped /claw command override; command resolution will now fall back to the user's scoped definition.
* **Documentation**
  * Added a design note describing the change and confirming tests/CI status.
* **Chores**
  * Updated issue-tracker records to reflect the removal and to track follow-up validation work.

title: ci: remove repo-local /claw override
